header_intro: Senior year is a big deal, and your photos should feel like you, not like an awkward school picture from 2008. My goal is to make your senior portrait session fun, relaxed, and full of genuine moments. Whether you're laughing, striking your best model pose, or just hanging out, we'll create photos that best capture your personality and celebrate this exciting milestone in your life. You'll leave with amazing images, and hopefully a few laughs along the way! Each session is specifically tailored to showcase your senior's unique personality and achievements against the beautiful backdrop of the North Country of New Hampshire.
